description:
Recto: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.

Verso: Informal note in Judaeo-Arabic in rudimentary handwriting. Reporting that something was eaten by the worms. In the last line mentions 7.5 waybas. Dating: probably no earlier than 13th century.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
